case_title: GUMERSINDO ANTONIO DE LA LUZ VS. ELSY ALEMAN

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JAN-04-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-09-2011 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DE LA LUZ, GUMERSINDO ANTONIO AS TO DEFENDANT ALEMAN, ELSY DBA TRANSPORTES SALVADORENO SUCHITLAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF GUMERSINDO ANTONIO DE LA LUZ FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE LA LUZ, GUMERSINDO ANTONIO
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED 03/07/12 TO GUMERSINDO ANTONIO DE LA LUZ (ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-04-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-07-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF THROUGH SPANISH INTERPRETER--ARTURO SANCHEZ. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-12-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ALEMAN, ELSY DBA TRANSPORTES SALVADORENO SUCHITLAN
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF APR-16-2012 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
RETURNED MAIL (CONTINUE ORDER) TO DEFENDANT ELSY ALEMAN, "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED/UNABLE TO FORWARD".

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-16-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED TODAY IS INVALID: SECTION 3A IS NOT COMPLETED, AND NO PROOF OF MAILING FOR SUB-SERVICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED 3/7/12 TO ELSY ALEMAN
